assign_to_me.description: after insert, route the card to the calling user's inbox: agents self-route via user_card_agent; humans get assignee set to their linked person card

attributes.description: optional map of additional attribute name to JSON value

card_type_name.description: name of the card_type to create (e.g. project, task)

parent_card_id.description: STRUCTURAL parent card id (the enclosing project for a task); nil for top-level project cards. NOT the subtask link — see parent_task

parent_task.description: nest this new task under an existing task as a subtask (sets the parent_task link the UI parent/child panel uses); parent must be a task in the same project. Distinct from parent_card_id

phase.description: initial phase for value-cards; one of triage|active|terminal (defaults to triage)

title.description: value for the built-in title attribute
